run_load_tools: load public functions from python files into OpenAI tool schemas and callable implementations
run_run_tool_call: run a tool call loop that sends a prompt to an LLM and executes returned tool calls
run_get_best_tools_for_prompt: determine the best tool source files for a prompt using BM25 retrieval and OAT
run_run_tool_for_prompt: determine best tools for a prompt, load them, and execute the full tool call loop
run_main_cli: run the FunctionGemma CLI to dynamically load tool files and execute tool calls for a prompt
